resource.template: out=$(mktemp {workdir}/.codex-qsub.XXXXXX.out) && err=$(mktemp {workdir}/.codex-qsub.XXXXXX.err) && jobid=$(printf '%s' {script_quoted} | qsub -q {queue} -l nodes={node}:ppn={cores} -N {job_name} -d {workdir_quoted} -o "$out" -e "$err") && while true; do state=$(qstat -f "$jobid" 2>/dev/null | awk '/job_state =/ {print $3; exit}'); if [ -z "$state" ] || [ "$state" = C ]; then break; fi; sleep 2; done && sleep 1 && cat "$out" && if [ -s "$err" ]; then cat "$err" >&2; fi && rm -f "$out" "$err"
